name: Amigdalota (Almond Cookies)
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Farina or toasted bread crumbs (or Cream of Wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. If you blanch your own almonds, place them in the oven for a few minutes to dry, then chop finely.
2. Place chopped almonds in a deep bowl.
3. Add sugar to the bowl with the almonds and mix well.
4. In another bowl, beat egg whites lightly and add to the almond mixture.
5. Add farina or bread crumbs and vanilla, kneading until well combined.
6. Pinch off small portions and roll each into a ball.
7. Press half a candied cherry on top of each cookie.
8. Place cookies on a well-buttered baking sheet.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 250°F for about 20 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven and place cookies on a plate.
11. Sprinkle confectioner's sugar over the cookies before serving.
12. If desired, sprinkle rosewater or flower water on the cookies as soon as they come out of the oven.
